## Changelog

### New features

- _Stats [Beta]_ allow you to view the number of statups, logins and launches from your launcher. You can also view the distribution of your users by OS, profile and account type. The routes that allows users to push stats is rate limited to 1 handshake every 10 minutes, and 10 stats every 10 minutes. This feature is still in beta and may not be fully functional. Please report any issues you encounter.
- _Crash Reports_ allow your users to report crashes directly from the launcher. You can view the crash reports in the EML AdminTool and take appropriate action. The routes that allows users to push crash reports is rate limited to 1 handshake every 30 minutes, 2 crash reports every hour, and 4 crash reports every 24 hours.

### Bug fixes and improvements

- Improved server logs for better debugging and troubleshooting.
- Cached files are now stored in the `data/cache/` folder (private) instead of the `files/cache/` folder (public).
- Fixed an issue where the public API was not displaying the correct URL for file downloads.
- Improved uploading security by limiting the body size of uploaded files to 16MB.
- Updated dependencies to the latest versions to ensure compatibility and security.
- Minor bug fixes and improvements.

## How to upgrade

### First-time setup

Please follow [this guide](https://emlproject.com/docs) to install EML AdminTool for the first time.

### Upgrading from a previous version

1. Log in to EML AdminTool as administrator.
2. Click on the "Settings" tab.
3. Scroll down to the "Update" section.
4. Click on the "Update" button and wait for the update to complete.

Please note that EML AdminTool will not be available during the update process. We recommend that you perform the update during off-peak hours to minimize disruption to your users.
